publicProfile.title: Coach profile
publicProfile.selectFirst: Please select a coach from the matching page first.
publicProfile.aboutBody: I’m dedicated to supporting people in situations similar to yours. My focus is to create a safe and supportive space where we can explore solutions together.
publicProfile.privacyNote: Your privacy matters. All conversations and bookings are encrypted and secure.

profile.createSubtitle: You need to complete your coach profile before you can use your dashboard.
profile.editSubtitle: Update your information so the right people can find you.
profile.noticeTitle: You need to complete your coach profile
profile.noticeBody: Add an image, name and a short description to get started.
profile.name: Name
profile.title: Title
profile.avatarHelper: Paste a secure image URL. You’ll see a preview immediately.
profile.titlePlaceholder: For example: Stress coach, Life coach...
profile.shortPlaceholder: Briefly describe who you are and how you support your clients.
profile.longPlaceholder: Share more about your background, approach and what matters in your sessions.
profile.specialtiesPlaceholder: For example: stress, burnout, relationships (comma separated)
